findings.summary: Registry agent AGT-160 (consumer-onboarding-agent) has no persona file
findings.detail:
No persona file under prompts/route-persona/ or prompts/specialist/ declares agent_id: AGT-160.

Fix: create prompts/specialist/<slug>.prompt.md following the schema in the persona-audit spec §3.
